feat.name: Keep up the Good Fight
feat.text: Your commitment to protecting others keeps you going, even against insurmountable odds. Instead of being knocked out, you're reduced to 1 Hit Point. You increase your wounded value by 1 and gain a number of temporary Hit Points equal to your level that last for 1 round.

traits.name: Guardian
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the guardian class.

feat.trigger: An enemy reduces you to 0 Hit Points but doesn't kill you.
